pressReleases.title: Metadise Academy Unveils New Home and Enhanced Facilities at The Podium
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise Academy announced its relocation to The Podium, introducing an upgraded training and lifestyle academy designed to support professional learning, creativity, collaboration, and digital skills development.

pressReleases.title: Metadise Grand Opening Marks a Milestone for Sarawak’s Tech Future
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise marked the grand launch of its headquarters at The Podium, highlighting its role in Sarawak’s growing digital innovation ecosystem.

pressReleases.title: Metadise Digital Innovation Hub Launches at The Podium
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise was introduced as a digital innovation hub in Kuching, supporting digital transformation, community engagement, and future-ready talent development.

pressReleases.title: Metadise to Represent Malaysia at Global Augmented Reality Expo
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise was selected by MDEC to showcase its immersive metaverse project, Tech Me To Sarawak, at Augmented World Expo in California.

pressReleases.title: Metadise Academy Expands Future-Ready Training Programmes
pressReleases.excerpt: Metadise Academy continues to provide practical training in key digital areas including AI, cybersecurity, blockchain, and digital literacy.
content: Metadise Academy continues to support digital skills development through specialised training programmes in artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, blockchain, and digital literacy.
The academy’s course offerings are designed to help learners, professionals, and organisations build practical knowledge for the modern digital economy.
This initiative reflects Metadise Academy’s commitment to accessible, industry-relevant training and talent development in Sarawak.
